title: ASR Tactical Full Tang Clip Point Blade Slim Kydex Sheath Hook Handle - Chrome
description:
The ASR Tactical clip point blade has a super-fine point tip, making it ideal for precision tasks like hunting and self-defense. With a blade of just 3.5” in length and an overall length of 8.25”, it can easily fit inside of a pocket, backpack or purse for quick deployment. Our full tang blade features an ergonomic handle with a finger hook and comes with a sturdy black Kydex sheath so you can store the blade safely when not in use. The blade itself is constructed of heavy-duty stainless steel so you don’t need to worry about it rusting, making it great for outdoor use too. This blade is a must-have tactical and self-defense tool for anyone who values their safety either indoors or outdoors! Its decorative design also makes it a great gift for knife collectors and enthusiasts.

ASR Tactical Full Tang Clip Point Blade Slim Kydex Sheath Hook Handle - Chrome

The ASR Tactical clip point blade has a super-fine point tip, making it ideal for precision tasks like hunting and self-defense. With a blade of just 3.5” in length and an overall length of 8.25”, it can easily fit inside of a pocket, backpack or purse for quick deployment.

Key Features

  • CLIP POINT BLADE – This ASR Tactical knife features a clip point blade, which is characterized by its spine with a front section that appears to be clipped off. This type of blade has a fine point that’s ideal for precision tasks like hunting and self-defense.
  • FULL TANG FIXED KNIFE – Our full tang fixed blade knife is made of one solid piece of metal that constitutes the blade and runs down the handle as well, making it incredibly sturdy and durable.
  • COMPACT SIZE – The blade itself measures 3.5” and the overall length is 8.25” so you can store it in small spaces like pockets, backpacks, bags or purses.
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION – Made of heavy-duty 3CR13 stainless steel that won’t rust, this knife is great for use indoors or outdoors, rain or shine. The ergonomic handle features a finger hook and decorative holes.
  • KYDEX SHEATH – The ASR Tactical knife comes with a sturdy black slim Kydex sheath that features a metal pocket clip so you can easily affix it inside your pocket.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: HWT258CH
  • UPC: 810058480002
  • Color: Chrome
  • Size: 8.25 in

Our full tang blade features an ergonomic handle with a finger hook and comes with a sturdy black Kydex sheath so you can store the blade safely when not in use. The blade itself is constructed of heavy-duty stainless steel so you don’t need to worry about it rusting, making it great for outdoor use too.

This blade is a must-have tactical and self-defense tool for anyone who values their safety either indoors or outdoors! Its decorative design also makes it a great gift for knife collectors and enthusiasts.
